title: Nador, Oriental — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nador, Oriental: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nador is a city in Oriental with a population of 161,000. A Mediterranean port city near the Spanish enclave of Melilla, known for its lagoon and mining industry.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
